overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban residential neighborhood in Los Santos. The character crosses a busy intersection and proceeds along sidewalks lined with palm trees, apartment buildings, and occasional pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with multi-lane crosswalks

events.description: silver sedan passes left to right through the intersection
character steps off asphalt street onto concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating across the multi-lane intersection, moving between passing vehicles toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red billboard delivery truck driving through the intersection ahead
silver sedan turning right at the intersection

entered.detail: red commercial truck with large yellow advertisement on the side
white painted zebra crossing lines on gray asphalt
two-story residential buildings with balconies and flat roofs
tall palm trees lining the far side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban intersection with a red billboard truck visible in the distance. The character crosses the multi-lane road, navigating between a turning silver sedan and other traffic, before stepping onto the concrete sidewalk on the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with apartment buildings and palm tree canopy

events.description: moving into dappled shade cast by palm trees lining the sidewalk
passing behind wooden utility pole temporarily blocking view of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past apartment buildings with rental signs, maintaining a consistent pace

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt and dark pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: two-story building with stone lower facade and red SE RENTA sign
wooden power poles with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
grass and weeds growing between the concrete sidewalk tiles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by a stone apartment building with rental signage on the right and a street with passing cars on the left. Palm trees cast dappled shadows on the path as the character passes a pedestrian and continues past utility poles.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching corner with commercial building and intersection

events.description: character approaches street corner and begins turning right
dark sedan drives past on the cross street as character waits at corner

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians and turning right at the street corner

notable_agents.action: man in gray hoodie crossing the sidewalk from right to left
dark colored sedan driving down the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: single-story commercial building with red signage and metal security bars
large spiky succulent plant growing at the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the sidewalk past additional apartment buildings, approaching a corner with a liquor store. After passing a pedestrian in a gray hoodie and waiting for a sedan to pass, the character turns right at the corner, passing a large agave plant and entering a new street view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood, transitioning from a busy multi-lane intersection into a quiet residential street. It begins with the character crossing a wide road, navigating past a turning silver sedan and a distant red billboard truck before stepping onto the concrete sidewalk. As the character proceeds, the environment shifts to a residential stretch bordered by a stone apartment building with rental signs and palm trees that cast dappled shadows across the path. The scene then expands past utility poles and additional apartment blocks, moving toward a street corner featuring a liquor store and a pedestrian in a gray hoodie. Finally, after waiting for a passing sedan, the camera turns right past a large agave plant to enter a new street view.
